set_fields.description: Register /forge command with subcommand dispatch.nn## /forge start <task-id>n- Validate task-id exists in backlog (backlog show)n- Create .pi/forge/<task-id>/state.jsonn- Read backlog item descriptionn- Activate forge_done tooln- Inject IMPLEMENT prompt with task description (no prior feedback)n- Optionally open new session via ctx.newSession()nn## /forge stopn- Pause active forge (set status=paused)n- Deactivate both toolsnn## /forge resume <task-id>n- Load state, set status=activen- Re-read backlog itemn- Activate correct tool for current phasen- Inject appropriate prompt (IMPLEMENT or REVIEW)n- If phase=implementing, open new sessionnn## /forge statusn- List all forges with state summarynn## /forge set <task-id> reviewer model <model-id>n- Update state.reviewer.modelnn## /forge cancel <task-id>n- Delete .pi/forge/<task-id>/ directoryn- Deactivate tools if this was the active forgenn## DoDn- All subcommands workn- Argument validation with helpful errorsn- Tab completion for subcommands
